events.label: reasoning
events.text:
The scenario describes that tags, ratings, and layout callouts line up with the installed work, and the revision block is current. The work has been tested/inspected. No component conditions are flagged. The reference materials (NEC 240, 210.8, 210.12, 110.14(C)) are on hand and the work appears compliant.

This is a pass scenario.
